creator: stefan@fh-mainz.de
text:
I approve the patch.
I very much appreciate your commitment.
Many thanks, Stefan


Am 13.03.12 08:00, schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of devel/p5-RRDTool-OO,
>
> Please note that PR ports/165998 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/165998
